name: Skeptic Scout
subtitle: Proof-of-Analysis Research Agent for Mantle RWA
description: An event-driven research agent that reads Mantle RWA on-chain data and emits skeptical analyst memos instead of hype summaries.

claims: Every memo must cite block number and contract address.
Every memo must include Bear case, Wash trade suspicion, Who benefits, and Counter-narrative.
All numeric claims must come from an on-chain snapshot or be labeled unavailable.
